ai.notes: The form includes a hCaptcha widget which is not represented as a standard input field. The phone number field uses a custom country selector component.

fields.question: How many years of professional experience do you have?
What's your English language proficiency level?
options: A1 (Beginner): Basic phrases, very limited communication.
A2 (Elementary): Simple tasks, basic professional interactions.
B1 (Intermediate): Understands main points, handles routine IT discussions.
B2 (Upper Intermediate): Good operational command, fluent in most IT contexts.
C1 (Advanced): Highly proficient, effective communication in complex IT scenarios.
C2 (Proficient): Near-native fluency, comprehensive understanding for any IT role.
